texts.welcome: Hi {}! This is Aule Libere Polimi bot, with this bot you will be able to search free classrooms for the entire week! Original bot by Daniele Ferrazzo, now maintained by Joel Shepard. For issues or suggestions, contact me! If you want more information select info! You can terminate the conversation whenever you want using /terminate
texts.error: Use the buttons you fucking donkey!
texts.ops:
In this time slot PoliMi is closed!
I will give you instead the free classrooms of tomorrow morning from 8 a.m. to 10 a.m.
texts.terminate:
Conversation terminated!
Press /start to start again the conversation!
texts.info: To start the Search process simply touch the "🔍Search" button and then insert using the custom keyboard the asked information The "🕒Now" button allows you, after setting your preferences, to quickly search the free classrooms! The "⚙️Preferences" button allows you to set your preferences about yout preferred campus and the duration in term of hours for the quick search. Also allows you to change language! The code is available on GitHub here Original bot by Daniele Ferrazzo.
texts.settings: Open the Mini App below to set your preferred language, campus and search duration.
texts.campus: Choose the preferred campus for the quick search
texts.time: Choose the amount of hours for the quick search
texts.missing:
Set your campus preference first!
Press the button below to open the Mini App.
texts.exception: An exception occurred during the search process☹️ Try again later or contact me for further info
